description_long: This object is a small-scale model of a commercial passenger airplane, positioned on a wooden surface surrounded by various colorful toys and objects. The airplane features a streamlined fuselage with a white body and dark windows, and its wings are mounted low on the fuselage with visible engines beneath each wing. The tail section includes a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a conventional arrangement. The landing gear appears to be fixed and is visible beneath the main body and nose. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with a distinct window section marking its position.
description: A detailed model of a commercial passenger airplane with a white fuselage, low-mounted wings, and visible engines, set among toys on a wooden surface.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from above and slightly to the side, showing the full wingspan, engines, and cockpit detail, with surrounding toys clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the airplane's right side and wing, with the tail and nose both visible, and more of the surrounding toys in the background.
description_view_2: The left side of the airplane is prominent, with the tail and cockpit both visible, and the airplane's position among the toys is clear.
description_view_3: A rear-side view emphasizes the tail section and the left wing, with the airplane's engines and landing gear partially visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin underwing jet engines, likely representing turbofan or jet type.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle fixed landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-window canopy at the front of the fuselage.
